view.title: Settings
view.description.providers: Configure AI providers and select models for different tasks
general.title: General
general.subtitle: Change how the app looks
general.theme.title: Theme
general.language.title: Language
aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.subtitle: Control how research agents run in parallel
aiAgents.concurrency.title: Parallel Agents
aiAgents.concurrency.description: Set the maximum number of agent tasks that can run simultaneously
aiAgents.concurrency.label: Max parallel agents
aiAgents.concurrency.tooltip: Controls how many search and extraction tasks run at the same time. Higher concurrency increases the risk of hitting your provider's rate limit. Once the limit is reached, tasks may fail or retry automatically, which can make the overall job much slower than a lower concurrency setting. The optimal value depends on your provider's rate limit policy.
aiAgents.concurrency.hint: Depends on your provider's rate limit policy
aiAgents.retries.title: Agent Retries
aiAgents.retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for agent operations
aiAgents.retries.label: Max retries
aiAgents.retries.tooltip: Controls how many times an agent will retry when operations fail (connection errors, tool call failures, etc.)
aiAgents.retries.hint: Higher values increase resilience but may slow down failure responses
aiAgents.searchEngine.title: Search Engine
aiAgents.searchEngine.description: Choose which search engine agents use for web research
aiAgents.searchEngine.label: Default search engine
aiAgents.searchEngine.custom.name: Engine name
aiAgents.searchEngine.custom.url.hint: Use %s where the search query should be inserted
